prd.oneLiner: Connect users, roles and groups, access requests, approvals, provisioning, periodic reviews, and audit reporting.
prd.goal: Process 90% of standard access requests within SLA and reduce unreviewed entitlements.
prd.whyNow: Accounts and access requests are scattered across email and chat, making approval evidence and entitlement history hard to track.
prd.problem: Accounts and access requests are scattered across email and chat, making approval evidence and entitlement history hard to track.
prd.solution: Connect users, roles and groups, access requests, approvals, provisioning, periodic reviews, and audit reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee requesting access to a work system
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Accounts and access requests are scattered across email and chat, making approval evidence and entitlement history hard to track.

targets.name: IT security and identity administrator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Accounts and access requests are scattered across email and chat, making approval evidence and entitlement history hard to track.

scenarios.text: Employee requesting access to a work system completes account creation and access-request submission and checks progress.
IT security and identity administrator reviews access request, approval lead-time, and unreviewed-entitlement reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Process 90% of standard access requests within SLA and reduce unreviewed entitlements.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: User, role, group, and entitlement lookup
Approval, provisioning, access change, and periodic-review handling
Access request, approval lead-time, and unreviewed-entitlement reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
